# loom

loom is a CLI for triaging and actioning GitHub PR comments.

## Docs

- README: ./README.md
- LLM Integration Guide: ./docs/LLM_GUIDE.md
- Skill: ./skills/loom-pr-comments/SKILL.md

## Key commands

- `loom list --pr <n> [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom find --pr <n> --query <text> [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment --pr <n> (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment --pr <n> --path <file> --line <n> --side RIGHT (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment --pr <n> --path <file> --start-line <n> --start-side RIGHT --line <n> --side RIGHT (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment --pr <n> --path <file> --subject file (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom edit --comment <id> (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--type auto|review|top-level] [--json]`
- `loom delete --comment <id> [--repo owner/repo] [--type auto|review|top-level] [--json]`
- `loom merge --pr <n> [--repo owner/repo] [--method merge|squash|rebase] [--json]`
- `loom reply --pr <n> --comment <id> --body <text> [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom resolve --thread <PRRT_...> [--json]`
- `loom unresolve --thread <PRRT_...> [--json]`
